prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低位次分别为约15011→19159→18736→16189→41040名。2021–2024年位次在15000–19000区间波动，整体相对稳定；2025年位次骤降至41040名，出现明显断档，主要与广西2024年首年新高考改革后专业组设置调整（全部要求首选物理再选化学）及招生计划大幅扩招有关。2025年基准位次约41040名；该校在广西招生计划持续扩增：2021年71人→2022年81人→2023年81人→2024年108人→2025年147人→2026年177人。2026年较2025年扩招30人（增幅约20.4%），扩招幅度较大，对竞争格局有显著影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第113位持续上升至2026年第97位，排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所提升；2022年曾因郑强管理争议出现偏负面声誉信号，但近年声誉平稳，未出现在2023–2026年声誉事件统计中；抖音热度总排名第63位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量中等；未见明显投档断档记录（2025年位次异常属招生计划与专业组调整所致，非声誉事件引发）；第五轮学科评估中化学工程与技术获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科；该校为山西省唯一211，理工类特色鲜明，在矿业、材料、化工等领域有传统优势。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示：电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信为高热推荐；计算机类为推荐/偏热；人工智能为谨慎观望；土木建筑为分化观望；生化环材为一般观望（较往年有所升温）。广西物理类考生数2024年约250877人、2025年约260429人，2026年总考生约392000人，按近年物理类占比约67.4%估算约264208人，较2025年小幅增长约1.45%，竞争略有加剧。；太原理工大学位于山西省太原市，距广西较远，属跨省招生；广西考生对省外211高校的报考意愿受地域偏好影响，但该校作为山西省唯一211，品牌认知度较高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年断档异常后的回补预期、2026年招生计划继续扩招20.4%、软科排名持续上升、广西物理类考生小幅增长等因素：，但2025年断档属异常波动，2026年预计有明显回补效应，结合学校层次提升和声誉平稳，在基准位次基础上适度前移修正。预测2026年最低位次约43065名，区间42565–43565名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年预测位次约43065名，区间42565–43565名。位次在此区间内建议以二档为主力填报、一档专业作为冲刺、三档专业作为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（即小于42565名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（电气、计算机类）；位次接近区间上限（43565名附近）建议以三档专业为主，兼顾二档中位次较低的专业（如能源与动力工程、通信工程等）。该校化学工程与技术为A-优势学科，虽属三档但学科实力突出，适合对化工方向有兴趣的考生重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 15011 → 19159 → 18736 → 16189 → 41040. From 2021 to 2024, rankings fluctuated within the 15000–19000 range, showing overall stability; in 2025, the ranking dropped sharply to 41040, indicating a clear discontinuity, mainly due to adjustments in major group settings after Guangxi's first year of the new college entrance examination reform in 2024 (all requiring physics as first choice and chemistry as second choice) and a significant expansion of enrollment plans. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 41040; the university's enrollment plan in Guangxi has been continuously expanding: 71 in 2021 → 81 in 2022 → 81 in 2023 → 108 in 2024 → 147 in 2025 → 177 in 2026. In 2026, compared to 2025, there is an increase of 30 students (an increase of about 20.4%), which is a relatively large expansion and has a significant impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science China University Rankings have steadily risen from 113th in 2021 to 97th in 2026, reflecting the university's enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates; in 2022, there was a slightly negative reputation signal due to the management controversy of Zheng Qiang, but in recent years, the reputation has been stable, and it has not appeared in the reputation event statistics from 2023 to 2026; the overall ranking on Douyin popularity is 63rd, rated as 'average', with moderate exposure on short video platforms; no obvious admission cutoff discontinuities have been observed (the abnormal ranking in 2025 is due to enrollment plan and major group adjustments, not reputation events); in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university; the university is the only 211 in Shanxi Province, with distinctive characteristics in engineering, and has traditional advantages in fields such as mining, materials, and chemical engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows: Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication are high-heat recommendations; Computer Science is recommended/slightly hot; Artificial Intelligence is cautious to observe; Civil Engineering and Architecture are differentiated to observe; Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials are generally to observe (warming up compared to previous years). The number of physics category candidates in Guangxi was approximately 250877 in 2024, 260429 in 2025, and the total number of candidates in 2026 is about 392000, estimated at about 264208 based on the recent physics category proportion of about 67.4%, a slight increase of about 1.45% compared to 2025, indicating slightly intensified competition. Taiyuan University of Technology is located in Taiyuan City, Shanxi Province, far from Guangxi, and is an inter-provincial enrollment; Guangxi candidates' willingness to apply for out-of-province 211 universities is influenced by regional preferences, but as the only 211 in Shanxi Province, the university has high brand recognition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the expected rebound after the abnormal discontinuity in 2025, the continued expansion of the enrollment plan by 20.4% in 2026, the steady rise in Soft Science rankings, and the slight increase in Guangxi physics category candidates: however, the 2025 discontinuity is an abnormal fluctuation, and a significant rebound effect is expected in 2026. Combined with the improvement in university level and stable reputation, a moderate forward adjustment is made based on the baseline ranking. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 43065, with a range of 42565–43565.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking for 2026 is approximately 43065, with a range of 42565–43565. Candidates with rankings within this range are advised to use Tier 2 as the main choice, Tier 1 majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety; candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (i.e., less than 42565) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical, Computer Science); candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (around 43565) are advised to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, while also considering lower-ranked Tier 2 majors (such as Energy and Power Engineering, Communication Engineering, etc.). The university's Chemical Engineering and Technology is an A- advantageous discipline, although it is in Tier 3, its disciplinary strength is outstanding, making it suitable for candidates interested in the chemical engineering direction.
